The Testimonies

30 Chapters of Walking on Water

Every chapter is a testimony — sickness, loss, rejection, fire, and midnight seasons, and the God who kept her through the deep water.

▶
Chapter 1

In the Beginning: James and Margaret

📜
“You have been chosen to know Me and understand that I alone am God.”Isaiah 43:10 · Prophecy Journal

Your life did not begin with pain.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 2

Every Girl Needs a James

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 3

The Foster Room Wasn't Home, But God Was

You do not need photographs to prove you were kept. Even in the rooms that did not feel like home, God was present, and He took you up.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 4

Mother of Many Nations: Rejected at the Door, Called by God

A closed door cannot cancel the word God spoke over you. What people denied, God can redeem — and what rejected you cannot undo what He called you to.

📜
“I will make you a Mother of Many Nations.”Hebrews 11:12 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony (coming)
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 5

The Footprint of Jesus in My Heart

Jesus can leave a holy imprint in places where pain tried to leave a scar. Even when you cannot see the whole path, His Word can give enough light for the next step.

📜
“What are you willing to give up to serve God?”Luke 14:33 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 6

When Everyone Walked Out, God Walked In

People leaving does not mean God has left. Sometimes the empty room becomes the place where God's presence becomes the clearest.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 7

Season of Shadows: When I Lost Everything, But God Kept Me

A shadow can feel powerful, but it cannot exist without light. Even in seasons where everything seems to fall apart, God can still keep you.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 8

The Fourth Dog: Grief at the Teeth of Another

God cares about every grief that touches your heart, even the grief others may not understand. If it broke your heart, God came near.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 9

The Daughter I Raised, the Silence I Carry

Love can be real even when there is distance. God remembers every seed, every prayer, and every sacrifice that people may forget.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 10

I Stayed. They Strayed. But God Stayed With Me

Staying faithful does not mean carrying what belongs to God. You can love, pray, and release without becoming bitter.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 11

The Hospital Stay: God Was in the Room

God does not wait outside the door until you are strong enough. He is a very present help — with you in the weakness, in the waiting, and in the room.

📜
“My Lord Jesus showed me the Scroll that read: you are ‘Healed.’”Prophecy 4.15.02 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 12

Still Living With Rods: 39 Bolts, 39 Stripes

Healing does not always mean there is no evidence left behind. Sometimes healing is God giving you grace to stand with the evidence still in your body.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 13

The Four Nodules Diagnosis: Whose Report Will You Believe?

A diagnosis may be real, but it is not your identity. You can respect medical wisdom and still believe God's report over your life.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 14

The Water Did Not Drown Me

The waters may be real, but they are not greater than the God who promised to be with you in them.

📜
“Behold, I do a new thing… I will make a pathway through the wilderness and rivers in the desert.”Isaiah 43:19 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 15

The Dove Experiences: God Came Like a Dove

God can send gentle signs of His presence. Not every confirmation is loud; some come softly, like peace landing on the heart.

📜
“I see you moving and flowing in the Gifts of the Holy Spirit with tremendous clarity and precision.”1 Corinthians 12:7 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 16

The Giraffe Revelation: Seeing Higher

Do not let a low season become your only view. God can give you higher vision even while you are still healing.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 17

Small Animals in the Kitchen: God Speaks in Strange Places

Do not dismiss the small or unusual places where God may be getting your attention. Creation can carry a message when your spirit is awake to God.

📜
“The Lord showed me a large flock of birds circling around you — His Divine Provision, as the ravens fed Elijah.”1 Kings 17 · Prophecy Journal (Dec 1, 2001)
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 18

Daniel 10: The Battle for Delayed Blessings

Delay is not always denial. Heaven may have heard you from the first day, even when the answer is still fighting its way through.

📜
“God said He's giving you a new assignment and new mandate, and He's lifting burdens off you.”Prophecy 4.15.02 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 19

It's Just a Shadow

Do not give every shadow the authority of a sentence. If you are under God's covering, fear does not get the final word.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 20

This Time the Enemy Will Not Steal

You can recognize the thief without fearing him. What God gave you is worth guarding, and what was stolen can still be restored by God.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 21

The Tomb Has Been Rolled Away: I Will Rise

What looks sealed is not always finished. God still knows how to roll stones away and call life out of buried places.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 22

Dry Bones Rattling: It Is Finished

Do not stop speaking life just because something looks dry. God can breathe again into what looks finished.

📜
“The final hour has come. It's over — you have won. Restoration is in My house.”12/14/2000 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 23

Fresh Fresh Fire: Burn for You

Do not confuse burnout with holy fire. God can reignite what pain tried to put out and fill you again with fresh passion for Him.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 24

I'm Coming Out at Midnight

Do not stop praying because it is midnight. God can use the darkest hour to open the doors that looked locked.

📜
“Go forth in Peace. I will do a new thing. The set time is now.”Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 25

The Scroll Was in My Belly

Some messages are not written first on paper — they are carried in the spirit. What God placed inside you may become healing for someone else.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 26

The Scroll of Survival: Living Testimony

Your survival is not invisible to God. Heaven remembers what people forget, and your life can become a living testimony of His keeping power.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 27

Rise Above the Soil: Fruitful Emergence

Every hidden season is not punishment. Sometimes God plants you before He raises you, because fruit needs roots.

📜
“You shall eat the fruit of the Lamb.”Prophecy Journal · received 11/2025
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 28

Faith Under Fire: I Still Believe

Faith under fire is not pretending the flames are not real. It is refusing to bow to fear while God stands with you in the middle of them.

▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 29

I'm Dancing on the Grave I Once Lived In

You are not required to live forever in the place that wounded you. God can turn mourning into dancing and make the old grave become the ground of your victory.

📜
“I've given you everything you need to take the world by faith… He will open up doors that no man can close.”2/27/19 · Prophecy Journal
▶ Watch Testimony
📖 Get the Book📜 Get this Scroll
▶
Chapter 30

This Is How You Walk on Water

Walking on water is not about never facing storms. It is about trusting the voice of Jesus enough to step, keep looking at Him, and know Him in the middle of the waves.

📜
“I will make you a Mother of Many Nations.”The closing commission · Prophecy Journal
